use_cases: Displaying contextual information on hover for any UI element
Creating tooltips with consistent styling across a design system
Enabling themed tooltips with light/dark mode support
Wrapping components with additional metadata or help text
ai_summary: A minimalist tooltip trigger component that wraps children and displays contextual content in a styled tooltip on hover. Uses react-tooltip for functionality with customizable placement (top, bottom, left, right) and supports light/dark mode theming via CSS variables. Ideal for adding contextual information reveals to any UI element without custom styling.
